EmailTemplate.name: AN - Payroll details
EmailTemplate.subject: Let's get you pay ready!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
PAYROLL DETAILS.
Hi {!User.FirstName},
Thanks for completing the Alliance Onbaording packs. Next step is to setup your payroll details. Once we've got that, we'll generate your contract and get you booked in for Induction. After that, you're ready to accept shifts!
Please head over to the Portal to update your profile: {Link to candidate portal}
If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to call us on 1300 034 494.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
